# Example JSON Files Generated by EasyTuna

## status.json
```json
{
  "last_alive": "2025-08-01T14:30:45.123456",
  "hostname": "gpu-server-01",
  "pid": 12345,
  "status": "optimizing",
  "experiment_id": "transformer_optimization",
  "study_id": "base_architecture_v1",
  "train_script": "/path/to/train.py",
  "metric_name": "accuracy",
  "optimization_direction": "maximize",
  "n_trials_target": 50,
  "n_parallel_trials": 2
}
```

## results.json
```json
{
  "last_updated": "2025-08-01T14:30:45.123456",
  "experiment_finished": false,
  "n_trials": 15,
  "n_complete_trials": 12,
  "n_pruned_trials": 2,
  "n_failed_trials": 1,
  "metric_name": "accuracy",
  "optimization_direction": "maximize",
  "best_trial": {
    "number": 8,
    "value": 0.9234,
    "params": {
      "lr_idx": 3,
      "batch_size_idx": 1,
      "hidden_size_idx": 2,
      "num_heads_idx": 1
    },
    "user_attrs": {
      "lr": 0.001,
      "batch_size": 32,
      "hidden_size": 256,
      "num_heads": 8,
      "num_params": 2048576,
      "lr_raw": 0.001,
      "batch_size_raw": 32,
      "hidden_size_raw": 256,
      "num_heads_raw": 8
    },
    "datetime_start": "2025-08-01T14:15:30.123456",
    "datetime_complete": "2025-08-01T14:25:12.654321"
  },
  "best_value": 0.9234,
  "best_params": {
    "lr": 0.001,
    "batch_size": 32,
    "hidden_size": 256,
    "num_heads": 8,
    "num_params": 2048576
  },
  "best_raw_params": {
    "lr_idx": 3,
    "batch_size_idx": 1,
    "hidden_size_idx": 2,
    "num_heads_idx": 1
  }
}
```

These files are automatically updated during experiment execution and provide real-time insight into experiment progress and results.
